justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified 'Thursday next week' as June 11th and accurately searched for availability around 3 PM on that day.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative slots when the user's preferred time was unavailable, providing several clear options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently clarified the meeting type in the first turn and proceeded to search and book the appointment without unnecessary exchanges.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly resolving the initial ambiguity and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent gracefully recovered from the initial unavailability by offering relevant alternative slots and maintaining full context of the user's preferences.
